PreToolUse.description: Pre-write gates: (1) ui-gate blocks new UI files without design-system consultation (closes v0.3.1 slop-page bug); (2) whiteboard-gate auto-starts the whiteboard server before writes to .stp/whiteboard-data.json (closes v0.3.0 empty-localhost bug).

PostToolUse.description: Stack-aware type/compile check + AI-slop pattern scanner after editing source files. Anti-slop blocks on 2+ high-confidence findings.

Stop.description: Quality gate: stack-aware type check + tests + unchecked items. Exit 2 blocks stop. 3-attempt max prevents session bricking. Context budget warn fires for balanced/budget profiles when main session approaches max_main_session_kb.

hooks.prompt: Context compaction is about to fire. Commit any uncommitted work now. State saved to .stp/state/state.json. After compaction, run /stp:continue to resume.

PreCompact.description: Save state to disk before compaction destroys conversation context

SessionStart.description: Wipe UI gate marker + auto-migrate old layout + restore context from disk after /clear or compaction. Wiping the UI gate forces re-confirmation of the design direction on every fresh session.
